zh.lifeSummary: 當Julian de Somery於1335年出生在英國武斯特斯爾福藍可利時，她的父親Robert de Somery17歲，母親Roberta13歲。她於1354年與Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton在英國武斯特斯爾福藍可利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1378年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾厄普頓 斯諾斯波利享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾厄普頓 斯諾斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julian de Somery于1335年出生在英国武斯特斯爾福藍可利时，她的父亲Robert de Somery17岁，母亲Roberta13岁。她于1354年与Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton在英国武斯特斯爾福藍可利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1378年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾厄普頓 斯諾斯波利享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾厄普頓 斯諾斯波利。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Julian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Julian de Somery was born in 1335, in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, her father, Robert de Somery, was 17 and her mother, Roberta, was 13. She married Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton in 1354, in Frankley, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1378, in Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julian de Somery est née en 1335, à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Somery, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Roberta, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton en 1354, à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1378, à Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Julian de Someryが1335年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーで生まれた時，父Robert de Someryは17歳，母Robertaは13歳であった。1354年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーでThomas de Westcote de Lyttleltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1378年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウプトン スノドスブリーで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウプトン スノドスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Julian de Somery(이)가 1335년 영국 워스스터실르 프랭클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Somery(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Roberta(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1354년 영국 워스스터실르 프랭클리에서 Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 업턴 스노드스버이에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 업턴 스노드스버이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton em 1354, em Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1378, em Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Upton Snodsbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julian de Somery родилась в 1335 г. в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Somery было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Roberta, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton в 1354 г. в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1378 г. в местности уптон снодсбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности уптон снодсбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
